original_image_tags: A yellowed, aged document page, appearing to be the back of a carbon copy or a routing sheet. It has two hole-punches at the top. The paper is heavily stained and the reverse side text is faintly visible as bleed-through. The primary content consists of the handwritten "Certified Copy" notation in the upper left, and official date stamps from the U.S. Department of Justice Mail Room at the bottom.

elements.description: Aged, yellowed paper with two punched holes at the top and a torn upper-right corner. Features a handwritten signature in the upper left and a stamped label in the lower right containing the date 'Nov 24' and '3:40 PM' alongside text indicating 'RECEIVED-M... ROOM' and 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE'. Faint, illegible text is visible bleeding through from the opposite side of the page.

judge.reason: Descriptions disagree on the verbatim text of the stamped label: A says 'Certified Copy' while B says 'RECEIVED-M... ROOM' and 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE'.
